data.name: log
data.value: [Achievements] LogLevel=1 FilePrinting=True ConsolePrinting=False ScreenPrinting=False Verbose=False [Arena] LogLevel=1 FilePrinting=True ConsolePrinting=False ScreenPrinting=False Verbose=False [FullScreenFX] LogLevel=1 FilePrinting=True ConsolePrinting=False ScreenPrinting=False Verbose=False [LoadingScreen] LogLevel=1 FilePrinting=True ConsolePrinting=False ScreenPrinting=False Verbose=False [Power] LogLevel=1 FilePrinting=True ConsolePrinting=False ScreenPrinting=False Verbose=True [Gameplay] LogLevel=1 FilePrinting=True ConsolePrinting=False ScreenPrinting=False Verbose=False
